mapper.select: INSERT INTO TB_MENU_LIST(SYSTEM_NM, MENU_NM, USE_YN, REG_DT, IF_DT) VALUES( #{SYSTEM_NM}, #{MENU_NM}, #{USE_YN}, #{REG_DT}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') )

INSERT INTO TB_USER_STATUS(SYSTEM_NM, EMPLOYEE_NO, USE_YN, LAST_EVENT_DT, IF_DT) VALUES( #{SYSTEM_NM}, #{EMPLOYEE_NUM}, #{USE_YN}, TO_TIMESTAMP(#{LAST_EVENT_DT}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS.FF3'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') )

INSERT INTO TB_USER_CONN_CHK("SYSTEM", YEAR, MONTH, "DATE", EMPLOYEE_NO, NAME, DEPARTMENT, LOGINDT) VALUES(#{SYSTEM}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE -1, 'YYYY'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE -1, 'MM'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE -1, 'DD'), #{EMPLOYEE_NUM}, #{NAME}, #{DEPARTMENT}, TO_TIMESTAMP(#{LOGIN_DT}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS.FF3') )

INSERT INTO TB_MENU_CONTACTLOG(SYSTEM_NM, REGID, MENUNM, MENUID, REGDT, MENU_1L, MENU_2L, MENU_3L) VALUES(#{SYSTEM_NM}, #{REGID}, #{MENUNM}, #{MENUID}, TO_TIMESTAMP(#{REG_DT}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS.FF3'), #{MENUNM}, #{MENUNM}, #{MENUNM})
